overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired witcher character exploring a medieval village at night with a torch. The character walks along dirt paths past wooden thatched-roof huts, encounters villagers and animals, and enters a building.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path alongside wooden hut with log fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path holding a torch, passing wooden fence and hut

entered.detail: rustic log cabin with straw thatched roof and dark wooden walls
vertical wooden log fence running along the path
dark silhouetted pine trees against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path at night, illuminated by torchlight. A rustic wooden hut with a thatched roof stands to the right, bordered by a vertical log fence, while dark pine trees loom in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path near hut entrance with seated villager

events.description: approaching corner of hut where a villager sits against the wall

agents.ego_description: walking past the corner of the hut and approaching a seated villager in red clothing

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing sitting on the ground against the hut wall

entered.detail: wooden barrel next to the seated villager

segments.scene_description: The character rounds the corner of the first hut and approaches a villager in red sitting against the wall next to a wooden barrel. The path opens slightly as the character continues past the hut.

scene_state.functional_zone: village common area with scattered inhabitants and animals

events.description: moving away from first hut into open village center area
dog appears on the left side of the path sniffing the ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center passing chickens and a dog, heading toward a large tree with a seated NPC beneath it

notable_agents.action: dog with dark and white fur sniffing the ground near the path
villager sitting under a large tree to the right of the path

entered.detail: tall tree with autumn-colored foliage providing shade
wooden picket fence marking the village boundary
stack of wooden planks and construction materials

segments.scene_description: Leaving the first hut behind, the character enters a more open village area with scattered chickens on the path. A dog sniffs near the trail while a villager sits under a large tree. In the distance, a picket fence and lumber piles mark the edge of the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: lumber yard area transitioning to second hut

events.description: approaching wooden sawhorses and stacked lumber area
approaching second wooden hut with villager sitting outside

agents.ego_description: walking through lumber area with sawhorses and planks, approaching a second hut where a villager sits outside on a stool

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on stool outside the hut entrance

entered.detail: log cabin with thatched roof situated on a slight elevation
wooden rack with stretched animal hide drying

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a lumber work area with sawhorses and stacked planks, approaching a second wooden hut. A villager sits outside the hut, and an animal pelt hangs on a drying rack nearby. The character circles around the hut toward the entrance.

events.description: entering the wooden hut through the doorway, transitioning from outdoor to indoor

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into the dark interior of the hut, torch illuminating the wooden walls

entered.detail: dark wooden interior with straw on the floor and wooden beam ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character steps through the doorway into the hut's dark interior. The torchlight reveals wooden walls, straw-covered floor, and the enclosed space of the rural dwelling, marking the transition from the outdoor village to the indoor environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal medieval village that transitions from a narrow forest path into the dark interior of a rural dwelling. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path illuminated by torchlight, passing a thatched-roof hut bordered by a log fence and looming pine trees. As the character rounds the corner of the building, the path opens up to reveal a villager resting by a barrel before expanding into a communal area filled with wandering chickens, a sniffing dog, and a figure seated beneath a large tree. The scene then shifts through a lumber work area with stacked planks and sawhorses, moving past a second hut where an animal pelt hangs on a drying rack. Finally, the camera follows the character as they step through the doorway, leaving the outdoor settlement behind to enter a dim room with wooden walls and a straw-covered floor.
